T2.DMM 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Getting Started with the Concept Management Model Package

    Create DAP-Specific Concepts into Database

    create_dap_specific_concept.Rd

    This function Creates DAP-specific concepts into a database using a DAP-specifc concept map (codelist). The function modifies the specified save_db by creating edited tables and Creating DAP-specific concepts.

    create_dap_specific_concept(
  codelist,
  name_attachment,
  save_db,
  date_col_filter = NULL,
  dir_save = NULL,
  add_meaning = FALSE,
  save_in_parquet = FALSE,
  table_name = "cdm_table_name",
  column_name_prefix = "column_name",
  expected_value_prefix = "expected_value",
  keep_date_prefix = "keep_date",
  keep_column_prefix = "keep_value",
  intermediate_type = "TABLE",
  partition_var = "concept_id"
)

    Arguments

    codelist

    A data.table containing information about tables, columns, and values for DAP-specific concepts.

    name_attachment

    Name of the table to be insert into the database.

    save_db

    The database connection object where the edited tables and concepts will be saved.

    date_col_filter

    An optional filter to subset data based on a specified date column.

    dir_save

    Directory path for parquet output (required if save_in_parquet = TRUE)

    add_meaning

    A boolean that defines whether to save the meaning of any CDM table -if available- in the results of the function. This is specific for the ConcePTION CDM. Default: FALSE.]

    save_in_parquet

    Logical; if TRUE, exports to parquet; if FALSE, inserts to concept_table

    table_name

    Name of the table in the codelist database. Default: "cdm_table_name".

    column_name_prefix

    An optional string that defines the prefix name of the column name variable column(s) from the DAP-specific concept map. Default: "column_name".

    expected_value_prefix

    An optional string that defines the prefix name of the expected value variable column(s) from the DAP-specific concept map. Default: "expected_value".

    keep_date_prefix

    Characther default: keep_date. The prefix value to identify the column where the column name with the date will be stored in the concept_table.

    keep_column_prefix

    Characther default: keep_value The prefix value to identify the column where the column name with the value will stored in the concept_table.

    intermediate_type

    Type of intermediate structure to create.

    partition_var

    Default: concept_id. Concept_table column to partition on.

    Contents
